content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is constructive — Nifty +0.56%, Pharma +2.47%, Auto/Metal/Realty/Energy all green, VIX cooling -4.6%. However, my book is already 54% deployed with 8 positions plus 3 OPEN BUY orders pending (POWERGRID, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) — heavy power/utility cluster exposure. Multiple existing names need active SL management given today's gains; new entries should be highly selective.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position at -3.1%. Strong Q4 (PAT +35% YoY, NNPA 0.13%) supports thesis. Stock recovered to Rs 78.95 from low; SL at 78.00 still valid (0.06 below CMP — tight). Let SL do its work; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1020.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+6.2% unrealized; trailing SL up. Note current SL at 1030 is already ABOVE this proposed 1020 — actually leaving SL where it is would be loosening if I went lower. Reverting: SL must be tightened. Setting new_stop_loss = 1030 (no change) is no-op. Will switch to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Correction: current SL 1030 is already above entry 984 — gain of +4.7% locked in. CMP 1045.85, intraday range 1040-1060. Tightening further to ~1035 would risk premature exit on noise; SL at 1030 sits just below today's intraday low (1040.35) buffer. Hold position. Best-in-class GNPA 0.93%, strong Q4. Target 1100 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.5%. SL 119 (~4.5% below) appropriate for ETF volatility. Gold consolidating near record. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0% only; SL already at 1418 = above entry 1412.94 (BE+). No change needed — this is a no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1418 is already at breakeven+ on entry 1412.94. CMP 1425.80, near 52w high. Strong Q4 (PAT +27%, double-digit volume growth). Target 1465 reachable. SL tight enough; let it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.7%; Q4 results April 30 (3 days). SL 2295 (~3.3% below CMP 2332.70) reasonable buffer for binary event. Volume accumulation (+47% delivery) and OI buildup support holding through. Risk acknowledged but research suggests sector rotation favorable. Keep SL as set."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "SL at 405 already = above entry 404.50 (breakeven). No-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "+1.3%. CMP 410.15 at fresh 52w high. SL 405 already at breakeven+ on entry 404.50. Hot summer demand + MSCI ESG upgrade + Q4 May 15 catalyst intact. Target 425 (consensus). Tight SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 55,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Research surfaced material BEARISH signals: active SFIO criminal probe, SEBI insider-trading restraint on former officials, Rs 1,979 cr derivatives lapse, suspected internal fraud not fully ring-fenced, RBI examining peer derivatives. Day's +3.5% pop is brokerage-target driven but governance overhang is unresolved. Position is flat (P&L -0.0%); exit at near-breakeven before further negative news. Capital preservation priority."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Just entered today at 1810; CMP 1804.50, flat. SL 1740 (~3.5% below) allows initial room for trade to develop. Bullish marubozu yesterday + 52w high breakout + power-cluster tailwind. Will trail once +2% locked. Note: heavy power-cluster exposure already (NTPC + TORNTPOWER + 3 pending orders POWERGRID/TATAPOWER). Need to manage cluster risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY @ 320.50 placed 388m ago. Per order hygiene rule, will not stack. Power cluster already heavy (NTPC held + TORNTPOWER held + TATAPOWER+POWERGRID+HINDZINC pending). Reconsidering: should likely cancel some pending orders to reduce cluster risk — see CANCEL action below."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 110,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CANCEL the pending OPEN BUY @ 443.00 (placed 448m ago, unfilled). Power cluster is becoming dangerously concentrated: I already hold NTPC + TORNTPOWER and have OPEN orders for POWERGRID and HINDZINC pending. Per cluster discipline rule, three+ names in same theme is the limit. Drop TATAPOWER to keep cluster manageable. (Note: this is intent to cancel pending order; if engine treats EXIT on no-position as reject, treat as no-op.)"
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 1500,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 23.65,
      "stop_loss": 22.85,
      "target": 24.95,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Diversified pharma ETF avoids single-stock earnings binary risk during peak results week. Sector rallying on Sun Pharma-Organon catalyst + Canadian semaglutide approvals expected. ETF gapped above 50-DMA. ~Rs 35,475 = ~3.5% allocation (small, given low conviction near 0.62 threshold). SL 3.4%, target 5.5%, R:R 1:1.6. Diversifies away from heavy power+financials cluster in book."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 78 just below CMP 79; tight. Bullish Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already locked at 1030 — gains protected at +4.7% from entry. Don't tighten further into intraday noise; let target 1100 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, marginally negative; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+ already. CMP at 52w high, target 1465 within reach."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings April 30 — accept binary risk; volume buildup constructive. SL 2295 set."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+ on Rs 405. Power tailwind intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Governance/SFIO overhang too material vs the recovery-pop thesis. Exit near breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered; needs room to develop. Will trail SL once +2% locked."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ANANTRAJ — ED raid is a kill-switch; avoid despite price strength. UTIAMC — loss-making quarter + downgrade; pass. AXISBANK — PAT decline + heavy macro provisioning, neutral; mean-reversion setup not yet attractive. HSCL — interesting battery materials story but overbought after +23% in 4 sessions; wait for pullback to 540-550. SUNPHARMA / ALKEM — sector rallying but premium valuation; if entering pharma play, the diversified ETF (PHARMABEES) is preferred per book context. IDFCFIRSTB — clean print, brokerage upside material; watch for entry on dip below 67. SAIL/JSWSTEEL — metals strong but no urgent setup today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 54% deployed plus 3 unfilled OPEN orders worth ~Rs 1.65L+ — if all fill, deployment hits ~70%. Power/utility cluster (NTPC + TORNTPOWER + pending POWERGRID + pending TATAPOWER) is the dominant concentration risk and exceeds prudent cluster sizing. Decision: keep POWERGRID and HINDZINC pending (defensive transmission + metals diversifier); drop TATAPOWER pending order. Exit INDUSINDBK on governance risk. New entry only in PHARMABEES (diversifying ETF, low conviction-appropriate sizing). 5-day win rate 9% is concerning — discipline on quality over quantity is priority. Daily P&L +0.29%, no stress on loss limit."
}
